Our Services

Complete Electrical Solutions

From simple home repairs to complex industrial power systems — we handle every electrical challenge with precision, safety, and expertise.

Home Electrical Solutions

Safe, modern, and energy-efficient domestic wiring, appliance installation, lighting upgrades, and full-home electrical solutions.

  • Complete home wiring & rewiring
  • Distribution board installation
  • Energy-efficient LED lighting
Get a Quote

Industrial Power Systems

High-load power systems, machine wiring, industrial panel boards, and robust maintenance contracts for factories and industrial units.

  • Heavy-duty power distribution
  • Industrial machine wiring
  • MCC & PCC panel installation
Get a Quote

ATS & AMF Panel Setup

Automatic Transfer Switch and Automatic Mains Failure panels ensuring seamless power backup for homes and businesses during outages.

  • Automatic Transfer Switch (ATS) installation
  • AMF panel design & commissioning
  • Generator synchronization panels
Get a Quote

Automation & Smart Control

Smart home and industrial automation with intelligent sensors, PLCs, and IoT integration for enhanced control and convenience.

  • Smart home lighting control
  • HVAC automation & control
  • PLC-based industrial automation
Get a Quote

Structured Cabling & Networks

Data center setups, structured cabling for enterprises, LAN installations, and reliable IT network infrastructure.

  • Cat6/Cat6A structured cabling
  • Fiber optic installation
  • Server room & data center builds
Get a Quote

Surveillance & Security Systems

Complete CCTV solutions, biometric access control, burglar alarms, and smart surveillance systems for total security.

  • HD/4K IP & Analog CCTV cameras
  • NVR/DVR recording systems
  • Remote viewing (mobile app)
Get a Quote

Repair & Maintenance

Emergency repair, fault detection, preventive care, and Annual Maintenance Contracts for uninterrupted electrical performance.

  • 24/7 emergency electrical repair
  • Fault detection & diagnosis
  • Preventive maintenance schedules
Get a Quote

Why Choose Us

Built on Trust,
Driven by Excellence

With over a decade serving Kerala, we've earned a reputation for reliability, safety, and exceptional workmanship. Every project we take on gets the same level of care — whether it's a single home or a large industrial facility.

  • Licensed & Certified

    All our electricians hold valid Kerala Electricity Board certifications and undergo continuous safety training.

  • 24/7 Emergency Response

    Electrical emergencies don't wait. Our rapid-response team is available around the clock, every day of the year.

  • Premium Quality Materials

    We use only ISI-marked, brand-certified components. Every installation is built to last decades, not just years.

  • Experienced Engineering Team

    Our team brings over 12 years of collective experience across residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.

  • Transparent Pricing

    No hidden charges. We provide detailed quotations before work begins. Competitive rates with no compromise on quality.

  • Pan-Kerala Coverage

    Based in Nilambur, we serve clients across all of Kerala — Malappuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kochi, and beyond.

Our Story Get Free Estimate

Industries We Serve

Powering Every Sector

Our expertise spans across all major industry verticals in Kerala.

Residential

Homes, apartments, villas, and housing societies

Commercial

Offices, retail spaces, malls, and showrooms

Industrial

Factories, manufacturing units, and warehouses

Healthcare

Hospitals, clinics, and diagnostic centers

Education

Schools, colleges, and training centers

Hospitality

Hotels, resorts, and restaurants

Our Process

How We Work

A structured, transparent process that puts your trust first — from initial call to final handover.

  1. 1

    Contact & Consultation

    Reach out via call, WhatsApp, or our contact form. We schedule a consultation at your convenience — in-person or remote.

  2. 2

    Site Survey & Assessment

    Our certified engineer visits the site, assesses your electrical requirements, and identifies any safety or compliance issues.

  3. 3

    Detailed Quotation

    We provide a transparent, itemised quotation within 24 hours — no hidden charges, no surprises. Free of charge.

  4. 4

    Skilled Execution

    Our licensed team executes the work using premium materials, following all safety codes and electrical regulations.

  5. 5

    Testing & Handover

    Every installation undergoes rigorous testing before handover. We provide you with all compliance documentation.

Ready to get started? It only takes a minute.

Start Your Project

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from real customers across Kerala.

Bright Electrical did an outstanding job wiring our entire factory floor. The team was professional, safety-conscious, and completed the project ahead of schedule. Highly recommended for industrial work.

RK
Rajesh Kumar

Factory Owner · Nilambur

Called them for an emergency at midnight — they arrived within the hour. Fixed a dangerous short circuit quickly and professionally. Their 24/7 service is genuine. Will always call Bright Electrical first.

PN
Priya Nair

Homeowner · Malappuram

We needed complete CCTV installation across our 80-room hotel. Bright Electrical handled everything seamlessly — from design to installation to training our staff. The system works flawlessly.

MR
Mohammed Rashid

Hotel Manager · Kozhikode

They rewired our entire school building during summer vacation — on time, within budget, and with zero disruption. The quality of work and materials is clearly superior. Students and staff are very happy.

SV
Sreelakshmi V.

School Principal · Thrissur

I've worked with Bright Electrical on multiple commercial projects. They're my first recommendation to every client. Technical knowledge, clean execution, and excellent communication throughout.

AT
Arun Thomas

Architect · Kochi

FAQs

Common Questions

Can't find the answer you're looking for? We're happy to help — reach out via call or WhatsApp.

Ask a Question Call 83049 10099

We are based in Chungathara, Nilambur (Malappuram) and serve clients across all of Kerala, including Malappuram, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kochi, Palakkad, and surrounding districts. For large projects, we can travel anywhere in Kerala.

Yes, we provide genuine 24/7 emergency electrical services. Whether it's a short circuit, power failure, or any other urgent electrical issue, our rapid-response team is available to assist you any time of day or night. Call us at +91-8304910099.

Absolutely. All our electricians hold valid certifications from the Kerala Electricity Board and are trained in the latest safety standards. We maintain all required licenses for both domestic and industrial electrical work.

Yes, we provide free site inspections and detailed estimates for all projects. Our engineer will visit your site, assess requirements, and provide a comprehensive quotation within 24 hours — at no charge to you.

We handle everything from domestic home wiring to complex industrial power systems. Our services include: home wiring & rewiring, industrial panel installations, ATS/AMF panels, smart automation, CCTV & security systems, structured cabling, and ongoing maintenance contracts.

Yes, we offer comprehensive AMC packages for residential, commercial, and industrial clients. Our AMC includes scheduled inspections, preventive maintenance, priority response for breakdowns, and detailed service reports. Contact us to discuss a plan tailored to your needs.

We accept all major payment methods including cash, UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), NEFT/RTGS bank transfers, and cheques. We provide proper GST invoices for all services.

A standard home wiring project for a 2-3 bedroom house typically takes 3–7 working days, depending on size and complexity. We provide a detailed timeline in our quotation before work begins, and we commit to completing on schedule.

Free Estimates · No Obligation
